title: BedrockWaters
description: Ports over various biome water properties from Bedrock Edition!
body:
# BedrockWaters BedrockWaters is a client-side quality-of-life mod which ports over the exclusive water properties from Minecraft Bedrock Edition—specifically: ## Features
Summary of features
  • More biome-specific water colors as to give each a more unique atmosphere!
  • More biome-specific underwater fog distance caps! (most of which further than Vanilla).
  • Biome-specific water opacity! (contrasting murky swamps from clear mountains!).
  • Default water textures have been changed to match that of Bedrock Edition!
  • Dynamic water color selection for modded biomes which use the default Vanilla water color!
All features are purely aesthetic but together yield a significant visual change in-game. Most biome properties can be found on the Minecraft Wiki [here](https://minecraft.gamepedia.com/Water#Bedrock_Edition). Download the latest version over at [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/BedrockWaters)! ## Images ![Plains Biome](https://i.imgur.com/4QvV9L6.png) ![Desert Biome](https://i.imgur.com/9FgJU10.png) ![Mushroom Fields Biome](https://i.imgur.com/uvc3aHR.png) ![Giant Spruce Taiga Biome](https://i.imgur.com/nuB0qht.png) ![Bamboo Forest Biome](https://i.imgur.com/S9Z9NOh.png) ![Nether Wastes Biome](https://i.imgur.com/qXE5Vwv.png) ![Texture Change Demo](https://imgpile.com/images/7RRAYW.gif) ![Underwater Demo](https://imgpile.com/images/tVo1ur.gif)
